parameters.query: ={{ $('FCO Config').item.json.testMode === true ? ($('FCO Config').item.json.testLeadId ? "SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Owner.Email, FirstName, LastName, Email, Company, Status, Engagement_Status__c, Last_Meaningful_Contact_Date__c, IsConverted, Next_Meeting_Date__c, MobilePhone FROM Lead WHERE Id = '" + $('FCO Config').item.json.testLeadId + "' AND IsConverted = false AND Email != null LIMIT 1" : "SELECT Id FROM Lead WHERE Id = null LIMIT 1") : "SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Owner.Email, FirstName, LastName, Email, Company, Status, Engagement_Status__c, Last_Meaningful_Contact_Date__c, IsConverted, Next_Meeting_Date__c, MobilePhone FROM Lead WHERE Engagement_Status__c = 'First Contact Outbound' AND IsConverted = false AND Email != null AND Status != 'Unqualified' AND Status != 'Do Not Contact' AND Status != 'Connected' AND Status != 'App Booked' AND Status != 'Follow-Up Requested' ORDER BY LastModifiedDate ASC LIMIT " + $('FCO Config').item.json.lookaheadLimit }}

={{ "SELECT Id, Related_Lead__c, Sequence_Status__c, Active_Sequence_Step__c, Next_Follow_Up_Date_Lead__c, Last_Sequence_Step_Sent__c, Last_Sequence_Email_Sent_At__c, Sequence_Key__c FROM Engagement_Status_Tracker__c WHERE Related_Lead__c = '" + $json.Id + "' AND Sequence_Key__c = '" + $json.Id + "_First_Contact_Outbound_v1' LIMIT 1" }}
={{ "SELECT Id, Sequence_Key__c, Last_Sequence_Email_Sent_At__c FROM Engagement_Status_Tracker__c WHERE Sequence_Key__c = '" + $json.sequenceKey + "_" + $json.step + "' LIMIT 1" }}
={{ "SELECT Id, WhoId, Subject FROM Task WHERE WhoId = '" + $json.leadId + "' AND Subject = '" + $json.callTaskSubject + "' LIMIT 1" }}
={{ "SELECT Id, WhoId, Subject FROM Task WHERE WhoId = '" + $json.leadId + "' AND Subject = '" + $json.smsTaskSubject + "' LIMIT 1" }}
={{ "SELECT Id, WhoId, Subject FROM Task WHERE WhoId = '" + $json.leadId + "' AND Subject = '" + $json.statusReviewTaskSubject + "' LIMIT 1" }}
={{ "SELECT Id, WhoId, Subject FROM Task WHERE WhoId = '" + $json.leadId + "' AND Subject = '" + $json.manualEmailTaskSubject + "' LIMIT 1" }}
